nestjs-beanstalk

Changelog
npm

Appearance

nestjs-beanstalkBeanstalkd transport for NestJS

Use @MessagePattern, @Payload, and @Ctx with Beanstalkd — just like any built-in NestJS transport.

Get Started
API Reference
View on GitHub
🔌

Drop-in Transport

Wire up BeanstalkServer with NestFactory.createMicroservice() in seconds — no boilerplate.

🔁

Automatic Retry

Jobs are automatically released back to the queue on failure. Configurable max retries and delay.

⚰️

Bury & Kick

Jobs that exhaust retries are buried. Resurrect them with kickBuried() or kickJob() at any time.

⚡

Concurrency

Spawn multiple reserve workers per server instance to process jobs in parallel.

🔗

Auto-Reconnect

Workers automatically reconnect to Beanstalkd when the connection is lost.

📋

NestJS-Style Logging

Logs use the exact same format as the NestJS framework. Plug in any LoggerService.

Released under the MIT License.
